EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user group "{object.name}" is removed on host {event_src.host}
Role "{object.value}" is revoked from the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User group "{object.value}" is removed from the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{object.value}" is removed from the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User "{object.new_value}" is added to the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user group "{object.name}" is created on host {event_src.host}
User group "{object.new_value}" is added to the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
Role "{object.new_value}" is assigned to the user group "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
